stemHtml: Which of the following must be considered if all generators fail in flight, and only battery power remains?

options.a: Most of the electrical driven systems will fail after a complete generator failure due to a significant drop in voltage when the battery takes over.
options.b: No special considerations are necessary since the battery takes over the emergency electrical power supply without any restrictions.
options.c: All AC-driven electrical circuits will fail since the battery only provides DC power.
options.d: Since the only remaining source of electrical power is the aircraft battery the consumption of electrical power is time-limited.
